description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Unittests Core that runs on workflow dispatch and push to any branch except release_doc. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.7 to 3.11). The job should update the OS, extract the branch name, check out core and plugins from the same branch, set up Python, upgrade pip, install requirements, build base requirements, and run unit tests with pytest for the core.
